This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in wound healing, fever reduction, and the treatment of various infections. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
